---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement.

## Use Case

Explain who benefits and when they would use it.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected user experience or API behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any simpler or existing approaches.

## Additional Context

Add diagrams, screenshots, or examples when useful.
